infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 26 - 28 Jun 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:10, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, McLaren Mastercard F1 Team Document 43 Date 28 June 2026 Time 16:38 No / Driver 81 - Os

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 17:10, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
McLaren Mastercard F1 Team
Document 43
Date 28 June 2026
Time 16:38
No / Driver 81 - Oscar Piastri
Reason Alleged breach of Article 12.2.1.i of the International Sporting Code and non-
compliance with Race Director’s Event Note (item 1, document 6) – Driving
unnecessarily slowly during reconnaissance laps.
Felix Holter Loïc Bacquelaine
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer
